title: acer palmatum var. ornatum
intro: Acer palmatum var. ornatum, also known as the Japanese maple 'Ornatum' or 'Bloodgood', is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Acer palmatum var. ornatum include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of various respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its roots to create decoctions, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
